ddls:
CREATE TABLE "galleries" (
  "gallery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gallery */,
  "gallery_name" TEXT /* Name of the gallery */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gallery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location where the gallery is relevant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gallery */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the gallery was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the gallery */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the gallery was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the gallery (public or private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gallery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "gallery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gallery the photo belongs to */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the photo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the photo */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the photo */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_gallery_id FOREIGN KEY ("gallery_id") REFERENCES galleries ("gallery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gallery_stats" (
  "gallery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gallery */,
  "num_photos" INTEGER /* Number of photos in the gallery */,
  "num_views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the gallery */,
  "last_photo_added" TEXT /* Date the last photo was added to the gallery */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the gallery */,
  "num_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the gallery */,
  "last_comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last comment on the gallery */,
  "last_like_date" TEXT /* Date of the last like on the gallery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gallery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_gallery_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "gallery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gallery the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "gallery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photo_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photo the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photo_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photo_comments_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photo_likes" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photo */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the photo */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id", "user_id")
)
